# SCORE Start, Buy, or Franchise Path Selection

> BOSS Libraries public routing record. Use it to find the right source, link, organization, or person.

## Description

Education for comparing whether to start a new business, buy an existing one, or consider a franchise.

## When to surface

The user is evaluating business entry paths.
